ques: Find the Resolve merge conflicts course in GitHub Skills and what actions learners will perform in this course.
answer: The "Resolve merge conflicts" course (GitHub Skills repo skills/resolve-merge-conflicts) teaches why conflicts happen and how to resolve them. Learners perform these actions: (1) learn the causes of a merge conflict, (2) learn the tools for resolving a merge conflict, and (3) learn when and how to resolve a merge conflict — using a web editor to fix conflicting changes in a Markdown file (a ~30-minute, beginner exercise prerequisite: Introduction to GitHub).
